benefits.description: Significant reduction in scar tissue (reported 30-50% reduction after combining peptides with fasting), improved walking comfort, reduction in hamstring numbness
Reduced inflammation correlated with scar tissue reduction

side_effects.description: After rapid scar tissue loss on right leg (which had less scar tissue), caused muscle tears when lying down on right hamstring and quad. Required KT tape stabilization.

protocol_notes: Initial protocol: 125mcg each of BPC-157 and TB-500 injected locally (subcutaneously) across both hamstrings and one quad (375mcg total), twice daily for 3 days on/3 days off cycle. Combined with 9-day green tea fasting (ECGC for autophagy), red light therapy, and electrolyte supplementation (sodium, potassium, magnesium). User later conducted fasting-only experiment and found fasting alone produced similar or better results than peptides. User concluded fasting was more effective for muscle recovery than peptides. Subsequent planned protocol: reduced to 50mcg localized/250mcg minimum systemic, once daily at night, 1 day on/3 days off. User noted initial protocol was too aggressive.
